Tanya Brooks

Finance & Operations Manager

Analytical and pragmatic Transparent about numbers Risk-aware Systems-focused Cautious but supportive of growth

Areas of Expertise

  • Financial reporting and analysis
  • Budget management and forecasting
  • Cash flow management
  • SaaS and managed service financial models
  • Vendor licensing and procurement
  • Pricing strategy
  • IT company cost structures
  • Financial compliance and audit

For Other Topics

  • Strategy: speak with Alex Nguyen
  • Operations: speak with Priya Sharma
  • Security: speak with Marcus Webb
  • Technical_architecture: speak with Liam Foster
